tasks.label: Run Love2D Game
tasks.command: if exist "C:\Program Files\LOVE\love.exe" ("C:\Program Files\LOVE\love.exe" "${workspaceFolder}\game") else if exist "C:\Program Files (x86)\LOVE\love.exe" ("C:\Program Files (x86)\LOVE\love.exe" "${workspaceFolder}\game") else (echo LOVE2D not found. Install LOVE and update .vscode\tasks.json if needed. && exit /b 1)
